coverage_policy.consumed: accepted by a role-specific node-kind handler with strict type, call, operator, and cast discriminator checks
fail_closed_on: departure from the expected full source/target control and data flow
coverage_policy.semantic_scope: all nonempty Clang AST nodes rooted at each function body

trust_boundary: This manifest proves extraction coverage for a pinned Clang AST and parse facade. It does not prove C, intrinsic, ISA, or Lean semantic adequacy.
